stemHtml: On an IFR flight in IMC under radar control, an aircraft experiences a radio communication failure. The aircraft is assumed to…

options.a: Maintain the last assigned speed and level, or minimum flight altitude if higher, for a period of 20 minutes following the aircraft’s failure to report its position over a compulsory reporting point and thereafter adjust level and speed in accordance with the filed flight plan.
options.b: Maintain the last assigned speed and level, or the minimum safe altitude, if this is higher, for a period of 7 minutes then proceed in accordance with the current flight plan to the designated navigation aid serving the destination aerodrome.
options.c:
Maintain the last assigned speed and level, or the minimum safe altitude, if this is higher,
for a period of 7 minutes then divert to the most suitable aerodrome according to the route of flight.
options.d: Proceed to an area from where the flight can be continued according to the visual flight rules.
